behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names dates.ts, LineGraph.tsx, insightVizDataLogic, prefix strings Day/Week/Month, lib/dayjs import convention — all test assertions map to these.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior (optional prefix param, capitalize interval) without giving exact code/line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check externally observable behavior (callback outputs) and presence of identifiers 'numericTickPrefix' and 'isStickiness' which are explicitly named in the instruction requirements.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests transpile and invoke createXAxisTickCallback via Node subprocess, plus AST parsing of LineGraph.tsx and running jest/lint.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub that returns default would fail the 'Day 1'/'Week 2'/'Month 3' assertions in test_prefix_day_ticks and test_prefix_week_and_month_ticks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Prefix behavior, backward compat (no prefix), lib/dayjs convention, and LineGraph wiring all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, repo_tests) and descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names affected files (as part of task scope) but does not point at specific line numbers or give the exact fix.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
